html:
Exclusive to:

The Air Unfreshener can be obtained by trading with the King of the Merms in exchange for Fishes.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.

The Air Unfreshener can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_25".

×2
plainText:
Air Unfreshener
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"trinket_25"
Exclusive to:
“It smells kind of stale.”
–Wilson
“I stuck one down Wolfgang's unitard when he wasn't looking. Haha.”
–Willow
“Smell like laundry.”
–Wolfgang
“It smells of decay and death.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO NOSE BUT I'M SURE I SMELL GREAT ALREADY”
–WX-78
“What an unpleasant scent.”
–Wickerbottom
“I already smell like pine and woodchips, according to Lucy.”
–Woodie
“The strongman's wardrobe is filled to the brim with these, judging from the odor.”
–Maxwell
“Perhaps the stench will drive the enemy away.”
–Wigfrid
“It's stinky.”
–Webber
“It's not a very pleasant smell.”
–Warly
“Little friend?”
–Wormwood
“Ha! Nasty!”
–Winona
“A lovely scent upon the breeze!”
–Wortox
“How get tree so small and flat?”
–Wurt
“It doesn't even smell like a real pine tree!”
–Walter
“It smells like pine needles. Dead, rotten pine needles.”
–Wanda
The Air Unfreshener can be obtained by trading with the King of the Merms in exchange for Fishes.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.33 days.
The Air Unfreshener can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_25".
